mapper.sql: select id, contract_no, status, contract_type, product_id, product_code, product_quantity, customer_product_No, customer_id, amount_untaxed, amount_taxed, invoice_pattern_id, pay_pattern_id, currency_id, shipment_type_id, exchange_rate, order_day, address_id, contact_id, so_type, project_id, sales_id, dept_id, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from ord_contract
mapper.insert:
insert into ord_contract
status, contract_type, product_id, product_code, product_quantity, customer_product_no, customer_id, contract_no, amount_untaxed, amount_taxed, invoice_pattern_id, pay_pattern_id, currency_id, shipment_type_id, exchange_rate, order_day, address_id, contact_id, so_type, project_id, sales_id, dept_id, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time,
#{status}, #{contractType}, #{productId}, #{productCode}, #{productQuantity}, #{customerProductNo}, #{customerId}, #{contractNo}, #{amountUntaxed}, #{amountTaxed}, #{invoicePatternId}, #{payPatternId}, #{currencyId}, #{shipmentTypeId}, #{exchangeRate}, #{orderDay}, #{addressId}, #{contactId}, #{soType}, #{projectId}, #{salesId}, #{deptId}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime},
mapper.delete:
delete from ord_contract where id in
#{id}
